meaning: n.制造者,上帝,[律]发期票的人
examples: Mary is the decision-maker in the house.
If it doesn't work, send it back to the maker.
The letter had come from an unknown mischief-maker.
Stumble across a hand-blown glass candy dish in Italy or a basket maker in rural Ohio?
Each year, the perfume maker celebrates a different flower and 2011 honours the orange blossom.
